title: Dynamic Glazing Visible Light Transmittance Levels
summary: Dynamic glazing provides four tint levels corresponding to 4%, 20%, 40%, and 60% visible light transmittance (Tvis).
evidence_quote: Typically, the tint corresponds to 4%, 20%, 40%, and 60% visible light transmittance Tvis depending on manufacturers.

title: Dynamic Glazing Orientation Applicability
summary: Dynamic glazing is most feasible on large glazing facades not facing north, working well on east and west orientations, and can be used efficiently on unshaded south facades.
evidence_quote: Dynamic glazing is usually the most feasible on large glazing facades not do not face north. It works well on east and west orientations since these are difficult to horizontally shade. It could also be used efficiently on south facades that are not shaded.

title: Desiccant Dehumidification Process
summary: In desiccant dehumidification, moisture is absorbed from air as the desiccant has lower surface vapor pressure; temperature rise reduces absorption capability.
evidence_quote: The moisture absorption process is caused by desiccant having a lower surface vapor pressure than the air. As the temperature of the desiccant rises, its vapor pressure rises, and its useful absorption capability lessens.

title: Desiccant Dehumidification Dew Point Applicability
summary: Applications requiring a dew point at or below 40°F (4.3°C) may be candidates for active desiccant dehumidification.
evidence_quote: In general, applications that require a dew point at or below 40°F (4.3°C) may be candidates for active desiccant dehumidification.

title: Unglazed Solar Collector Installed Capacity in North America
summary: In North America, swimming pool heating dominates with an installed capacity of about 55 × 10^9 Btu/h (16 GWth) of unglazed plastic collectors.
evidence_quote: In North America (i.e., United States and Canada), swimming pool heating is dominant with an installed capacity of about 55 × 10^9 Btu/h (16 GWth) of unglazed plastic collectors.

title: Solar Combisystem Components
summary: A typical solar combisystem installation for combined DHW and space heating includes solar collectors, a heat storage tank, and a boiler as auxiliary heater.
evidence_quote: A typical installation for the combined production of DHW and space heating (i.e., solar combi systems) includes the solar collectors, the heat storage tank, and a boiler used as an auxiliary heater.
